title: Translucent Lanterns
description: Makes the Glass from Lanterns Translucent and adds a little torch inside
body:
Makes the Glass from Lanterns Translucent and adds a little torch inside!

In [26.1 Snapshot 7](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-26-1-snapshot-7), Mojang changed the block model format so that any block model can now support cutout (transparent) or translucent (partially transparent pixels) textures. I just wanted to experiment with this, and this was the first thing that came to my mind! It's a small thing, but I think it's kinda neat!

---

If you're interested in seeing what else people can now do with this change, here are a few resource packs that utilize it. (I'll add more as I find them)
> [Glowing End Portal](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-end-portal/gallery) by AnolXD
> 
> [Transparent Glass Border](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/transparent-glass-border) by Puglin_Brute
